roles.title: System Architect / Solutions Architect
roles.summary: Designs high-level system structures and technology solutions that align business goals with scalable, reliable engineering.
responsibilities: Define overall system architecture and tech stack
Create solution designs for business requirements
Evaluate and recommend platforms and tools
Align architecture with business and product goals
Guide engineering teams on implementation standards

roadmap.title: Junior Architect
roadmap.focus: Learn design patterns and assist in solution documentation

roadmap.title: Solutions Architect
roadmap.focus: Design end-to-end solutions for specific products or projects

roadmap.title: Senior Solutions Architect
roadmap.focus: Lead complex enterprise architectures and mentor teams

roadmap.title: Principal Architect
roadmap.focus: Define organization-wide architectural standards and strategy

roadmap.title: Chief Architect
roadmap.focus: Drive technology vision across the entire company

interactions.description: Translate business requirements into technical architecture
Ensure feasibility and alignment with delivery timelines
Provide guidance on implementation and coding standards
Align infrastructure with system reliability goals

bestPractices: Validate designs with prototypes and reviews

resources.title: AWS Well-Architected Framework
resources.description: Guidance for designing secure, resilient, and efficient systems on AWS

resources.title: Martin Fowler's Software Architecture Guide
resources.description: Articles and patterns on enterprise architecture

resources.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
resources.description: Book on building reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems

resources.title: The Twelve-Factor App
resources.description: Methodology for building modern SaaS applications

roles.title: Software Engineer (Frontend/Backend/Full-Stack)
roles.summary: Builds, tests, and maintains software applications across client-side, server-side, or both.
responsibilities: Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code
Build user interfaces or server-side logic
Collaborate on technical design and code reviews
Contribute to automated testing and CI/CD pipelines

roadmap.title: Junior Engineer
roadmap.focus: Write features with mentorship and learn codebase conventions

roadmap.title: Mid-Level Engineer
roadmap.focus: Own features independently and improve code quality

roadmap.title: Senior Engineer
roadmap.focus: Lead technical design and mentor junior engineers

roadmap.title: Staff Engineer
roadmap.focus: Drive cross-team technical initiatives and architecture

roadmap.title: Principal Engineer
roadmap.focus: Set technical direction and influence engineering strategy

interactions.description: Clarify requirements and estimate delivery effort
Resolve bugs and improve test coverage

bestPractices: Keep functions and components small and focused

resources.title: freeCodeCamp
resources.description: Free coding curriculum for frontend, backend, and full-stack

resources.title: LeetCode
resources.description: Practice platform for coding and algorithm challenges

resources.title: Clean Code by Robert C. Martin
resources.description: Book on writing readable and maintainable code

roles.title: Database Administrator (DBA)
roles.summary: Manages, secures, and optimizes databases to ensure data availability, integrity, and performance.
responsibilities: Install, configure, and upgrade database systems
Implement backup, recovery, and disaster recovery plans
Ensure data security and access controls
Support developers with schema and query design

roadmap.title: Junior DBA
roadmap.focus: Assist with backups, monitoring, and basic troubleshooting

roadmap.title: DBA
roadmap.focus: Manage production databases and optimize queries

roadmap.title: Senior DBA
roadmap.focus: Design HA/DR strategies and lead migrations

roadmap.title: Lead DBA
roadmap.focus: Define database standards and govern data practices

roadmap.title: Principal Database Architect
roadmap.focus: Shape enterprise data strategy and platform architecture

interactions.description: Advise on schema design, indexing, and query performance
Ensure reliable data pipelines and storage foundations
Implement access controls and compliance measures
Maintain database availability and incident response

bestPractices: Automate backups and test restores regularly
Index wisely and monitor query performance
Keep database versions patched and secure

resources.title: PostgreSQL Documentation
resources.description: Official PostgreSQL reference and administration guide

resources.title: Use The Index, Luke
resources.description: Free guide to SQL indexing and performance

resources.title: SQL Server Docs
resources.description: Microsoft SQL Server administration and development docs

resources.title: Database of Databases
resources.description: Reference for comparing database management systems

resources.title: MongoDB University
resources.description: Free courses on MongoDB administration and development
